parameters.query:
WITH paid_cycle AS (
    UPDATE users_plans
    SET payment_status = 'paid'
    WHERE id = $1
    RETURNING id, user_id, plan_id, start_date, end_date, payment_status
),
paid_cycle_with_plan AS (
    SELECT
        paid_cycle.id AS paid_subscription_id,
        paid_cycle.user_id,
        paid_cycle.plan_id,
        paid_cycle.start_date,
        paid_cycle.end_date,
        paid_cycle.payment_status,
        plans.durantio_days,
        (paid_cycle.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS next_start_date,
        ((paid_cycle.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')::date + ((plans.durantio_days - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day'))::date AS next_end_date
    FROM paid_cycle
    INNER JOIN plans ON plans.id = paid_cycle.plan_id
),
next_cycle AS (
    INSERT INTO users_plans (user_id, plan_id, start_date, end_date, payment_status)
    SELECT
        user_id,
        plan_id,
        next_start_date,
        next_end_date,
        'pending'
    FROM paid_cycle_with_plan
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM users_plans
        WHERE user_id = paid_cycle_with_plan.user_id
          AND start_date = paid_cycle_with_plan.next_start_date
          AND end_date = paid_cycle_with_plan.next_end_date
    )
    RETURNING id, start_date, end_date, payment_status
)
SELECT
    paid_cycle_with_plan.paid_subscription_id,
    paid_cycle_with_plan.user_id,
    paid_cycle_with_plan.payment_status AS paid_status,
    COALESCE(next_cycle.id, existing_cycle.id) AS next_subscription_id,
    COALESCE(next_cycle.start_date, existing_cycle.start_date) AS next_start_date,
    COALESCE(next_cycle.end_date, existing_cycle.end_date) AS next_end_date,
    COALESCE(next_cycle.payment_status, existing_cycle.payment_status) AS next_status
FROM paid_cycle_with_plan
LEFT JOIN next_cycle ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN users_plans AS existing_cycle
    ON existing_cycle.user_id = paid_cycle_with_plan.user_id
   AND existing_cycle.start_date = paid_cycle_with_plan.next_start_date
   AND existing_cycle.end_date = paid_cycle_with_plan.next_end_date;

nodes.name: Mark Paid And Queue Next Cycle

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "paid_subscription_id": $json[0]?.paid_subscription_id ?? null,
  "paid_status": $json[0]?.paid_status ?? null,
  "next_subscription_id": $json[0]?.next_subscription_id ?? null,
  "next_start_date": $json[0]?.next_start_date ?? null,
  "next_end_date": $json[0]?.next_end_date ?? null,
  "next_status": $json[0]?.next_status ?? null
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE users_plans
SET payment_status = 'vencido'
WHERE payment_status = 'pending'
  AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE
RETURNING id, user_id, end_date, payment_status;

main.node: Mark Paid And Queue Next Cycle
